manifest.description: The official addon for movie and series catalogs
manifest.name: Cinemeta
Torrentio
manifest.description: Provides torrent streams from scraped torrent providers. Currently supports YTS(+), EZTV(+), RARBG(+), 1337x(+), ThePirateBay(+), KickassTorrents(+), TorrentGalaxy(+), MagnetDL(+), HorribleSubs(+), NyaaSi(+), TokyoTosho(+), AniDex(+), Rutor(+), Rutracker(+), Comando(+), BluDV(+), Torrent9(+), ilCorSaRoNeRo(+), MejorTorrent(+), Wolfmax4k(+), Cinecalidad(+), BestTorrents(+). To configure providers, RealDebrid/Premiumize/AllDebrid/DebridLink/EasyDebrid/Offcloud/TorBox/Put.io support and other settings visit https://torrentio.strem.fun

manifest.name: Torrentio BR
manifest.description: Brazilian Portuguese Torrentio fallback using Comando, BluDV, and MicoLeaoDublado providers.
Stremio's fastest torrent/debrid search add-on.
manifest.name: Comet
GuIndex
manifest.description: Brazilian stream addon for Stremio. Searches national torrent indexes and resolves streams through Real-Debrid or TorBox.

manifest.name: MediaFusion
manifest.description: Universal Stremio Add-on for Movies, Series, Live TV & Sports Events. Source: https://github.com/mhdzumair/MediaFusion

manifest.name: Jackettio
manifest.description: Stremio addon that resolve streams using Jackett and Debrid. It seamlessly integrates with private trackers.

manifest.name: TorrentsDB
manifest.description: Provides torrent streams from scraped torrent providers. Currently supports YTS(+), EZTV(+), 1337x(+), TorrentCSV(+), 1lou(-), Nyaa(+), Sk-CzTorrent(-), 1TamilBlasters(-), LimeTorrent(+), 1TamilMV(-), RARGB(+), Knaben(+), ThePirateBay(+), KickassTorrents(+), AnimeTosho(+), ExtremlymTorrents(-), YggTorrent(-), TokyoTosho(+), Rutor(-), Rutracker(-), Torrent9(-), ilCorSaRoNeRo(-), Manual(+) and RealDebrid enabled. To configure providers, Premiumize/EasyDebrid/Debrider/AllDebrid/RealDebrid/DebridLink/Offcloud/TorBox/Put.io support and other settings visit https://torrentsdb.com

manifest.name: Sootio
manifest.description: Your ultimate debrid companion. Sootio intelligently searches your debrid services for cached torrents, using a smart, tiered scoring system to prioritize the highest quality streams first.

manifest.description: Search for movies, series and anime from ThePirateBay

manifest.name: WebStreamrMBG
manifest.description:
Provides HTTP URLs from streaming websites. Configure add-on for additional languages. Add MediaFlow proxy for more URLs.

Supported languages: Albanian, German, Castilian Spanish, French, Gujarati, Hindi, Italian, Malayalam, Latin American Spanish, Punjabi, Tamil, Telugu

Supported sources: 4KHDHub, CineHDPlus, Cuevana, Einschalten, Eurostreaming, Filmpalast, Frembed, FrenchCloud, HDHub4u, HomeCine, KinoGer, Kokoshka, MegaKino, MeineCloud, MostraGuarda, Movix, RgShows, StreamKiste, VerHdLink, VidSrc, VixSrc

Supported extractors: DoodStream, Dropload, Fastream, FileLions, FileMoon, Fsst, HubCloud, HubDrive, KinoGer, LuluStream, Mixdrop, RgShows, SaveFiles, StreamEmbed, Streamtape, SuperVideo, Uqload, Vidora, VidSrc, VixSrc, VOE, YouTube, External
